title: French Chocolate Crepe
description: A classic French dessert made with rich chocolate and wrapped in a delicate crepe.
instructions: 1. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour and sugar.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, eggs, and cocoa powder.
3. Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and whisk until smooth.
4. Heat a crepe pan or non-stick skillet over medium heat.
5. Pour a small amount of batter into the pan and tilt to coat evenly.
6. Cook for 1-2 minutes, until edges start to curl.
7. Flip crepe and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
9. Melt chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 10-second increments.
10. Spread a small amount of melted chocolate on each crepe.
11. Top with sliced banana and intense to taste.
12. Fold crepe in half to enclose filling.
